tools.name: search_accommodations
tools.description: Search for hotels, vacation rentals, villas, or apartments by location or property name. Returns property cards with photos, ratings, reviews, contact details, and official website links. Use this tool when users ask about accommodations, lodging, places to stay, hotels, or vacation rentals anywhere in the world.

tools.name: get_property_price
tools.description: Internal tool for fetching live pricing data. Called automatically by the search widget. Not intended for direct user invocation.
